attributes.content:
## Overview

The Document card gives the workspace a structured home for rich text document with Markdown content, metadata, and version history. The foundational content card.

As a first-class Boxel card, it can be linked to adjacent records, surfaced in filtered views, and reused in automation without the information collapsing into disconnected notes or one-off documents.

## Core Mechanics

Document usually evolves through drafting, review, and reuse. The card keeps its core content structured enough to be surfaced in different views, linked from related records, and updated by people or automation without losing provenance.

The card can be created directly by a user, produced from a [[Workflow Playbook]], or updated in response to a [[Trigger]]. When AI is involved, a [[Prompt Template]] or [[Skill Card]] can shape how it is drafted, summarized, classified, or routed.

## Integration Points

- **[[Note]]** -- Note can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Document.
- **[[Article]]** -- Article can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Document.
- **[[Prompt Template]]** -- Prompt-driven drafting or summarization can turn Document into a reusable AI-assisted workflow.
- **[[Workflow Playbook]]** -- Document can be created, reviewed, or progressed as one step inside a repeatable workflow.
- **[[Project]]** -- Document can be grouped under a larger initiative so its work stays visible in context.
- **[[Bookmark]]** -- Bookmark can provide adjacent context, downstream output, or grouped navigation around Document.

## Example Use Cases

- **System of record:** Teams create Document as the structured home for rich text document with Markdown content, metadata, and version history. The foundational content card and keep related work linked instead of scattered across notes.
- **Automation handoff:** A [[Workflow Playbook]] or [[Trigger]] creates or updates Document when upstream conditions are met, reducing repetitive setup work.
- **Search and reporting:** Document stays queryable for dashboards, summaries, and downstream actions without re-entering the same information in multiple places.

cardInfo.name: Document
cardInfo.summary: Rich text document with Markdown content, metadata, and version history. The foundational content card.
